mapper.select: SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM users WHERE created_at BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(created_at)

-- 查询普通用户的核心信息 SELECT id AS user_id, -- 用户ID username AS nickname, -- 昵称 phone AS mobile, -- 手机号 DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS register_time, -- 注册时间（格式化） ext3 -- 状态 FROM users WHERE role = 0 -- 筛选普通用户（role=0） ORDER BY created_at DESC; -- 按注册时间倒序排列
